name: yxj-paper-os
description: Schema-0.3 prewriting design compiler with semantic template reading, controlled writing surfaces, and scoped handoffs.

interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS compiles repository evidence, model-semantic template reading, conditional academic lenses, and four bounded owner gates into a schema-0.3 six-file writing-design handoff without drafting manuscript prose or executing downstream skills.
capabilities: Model-semantic template reading with design-only provenance
Paragraph functions and controlled sentence frames
Language, visual/caption, traceability, rule, and soft-budget design
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os to inspect my repository and eligible template literature, resolve only consequential owner gates, and compile a validated schema-0.3 six-file prewriting design handoff without drafting manuscript prose.
